message:
feat(fp-frame): add DataFrame.at + Series.map_callable parity (frankenpandas-xi36)

Two scalar-access/mapping helpers:

- DataFrame::at(label, column) — single-cell lookup by (row label,
  column name). Matches pd.DataFrame.at[label, col]. Returns
  CompatibilityRejected for unknown labels/columns.
- Series::map_callable(func) — function-form of Series.map,
  complementing the existing dict-form map. Missing values pass
  through as Null(NaN) without invoking the user function (pandas
  na_action='ignore' default). A call-counter test proves func is
  not invoked on null positions.

Co-lands frankenpandas-ir3p (Series.map callable).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
